bucket_name.description: Unique name for the S3 bucket (must be globally unique across AWS)

force_destroy.description: If true, all objects are deleted when the bucket is destroyed

enable_versioning.description: Enable versioning to keep multiple variants of objects

kms_key_arn.description: ARN of the KMS key for encryption (required if sse_algorithm is aws:kms)

block_public_access.description: Block all public access to the bucket

enable_cors.description: Enable CORS configuration for cross-origin access

cors_allowed_origins.description: List of origins allowed to make cross-origin requests

cors_allowed_methods.description: HTTP methods allowed for CORS requests

cors_allowed_headers.description: Headers allowed in CORS preflight requests

cors_expose_headers.description: Headers exposed to the browser in CORS responses

cors_max_age_seconds.description: Time in seconds that browser can cache the preflight response

logging_target_bucket.description: Target bucket for access logs (required if enable_logging is true)

enable_lifecycle.description: Enable lifecycle rules for automatic object management

lifecycle_expiration_days.description: Number of days until objects expire

lifecycle_noncurrent_expiration_days.description: Number of days until noncurrent versions expire

lifecycle_abort_incomplete_days.description: Number of days to abort incomplete multipart uploads

tags.description: Tags to apply to the S3 bucket

bucket_domain_name.description: Domain name of the S3 bucket

bucket_regional_domain_name.description: Regional domain name of the S3 bucket
